mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_course_schedule WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_course_schedule(course_id, teacher_id, day_of_week, start_period, end_period, capacity, enrolled_count) VALUES(#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startPeriod}, #{endPeriod}, #{capacity}, #{enrolledCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_course_schedule SET course_id = #{courseId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, start_period = #{startPeriod}, end_period = #{endPeriod}, capacity = #{capacity} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE t_course_schedule SET enrolled_count = enrolled_count + #{delta} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT cs.*, c.course_name, t.teacher_name AS teacher_name FROM t_course_schedule cs JOIN t_course c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN t_teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.teacher_id ORDER BY cs.day_of_week, cs.start_period

SELECT cs.*, c.course_name, t.teacher_name AS teacher_name FROM t_course_schedule cs JOIN t_course c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN t_teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY cs.day_of_week, cs.start_period
